2359510.name: My Furry Girlfriend 🐾
2359510.description:
My Furry Girlfriend is a short novel about a romantic relationship between a swimmer and her trainer. After a heated argument they decide to take a small pause and interact like "trainer and trainee".
During the preparation to the next competition they slowly resolve their problems and regain mutual affection.

Spend some time together with them, take a peek at their relationship and discover how they restored it!
